locator.quote: Three independent benefits fell out: (a) parquet values can't store

text: Clamping log-var inside forward gives three benefits: (a) parquet values can't store a silently-NaN stddev, (b) the NLL helper stays minimal, (c) one direct test of the single clamp site.

locator.quote: is a direct test of the single clamp site.

text: Clamping at the single forward-pass site means test_log_var_clamped_in_forward is a direct test of the single clamp site.
